title: revert claude naming to original scheme
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Classic Claude is back
gist.blurb: We've reverted the primary Claude model names back to their classic, simple handles like `claude` and `claude-fast`. Don't worry, the specific version names still work perfectly as aliases!
gist.summary: Reverted the primary Claude model identifiers to their original, simplified naming scheme while retaining the specific version names as aliases.
gist.impact: Developers can continue using familiar model names without updating their code, while still having the option to target specific model versions via aliases.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing name tags or labels in a cozy setting, swapping out complex, long labels for clean, simple ones. Represents the return to a simpler naming convention.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing simple name tags on a wooden desk, happily swapping out complex labels for clean, simple ones. A retro computer monitor glows softly in the background. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing simple name tags on a wooden desk, happily swapping out complex labels for clean, simple ones. A retro computer monitor glows softly in the background. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
